name: chart-tooltip-label-none
visual_summary: A chart tooltip label that is not visible or displayed. This component is used when additional information is required but doesn't need to be displayed directly on the chart.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready utility component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-tooltip-label-none
Description: A chart tooltip label that is not visible or displayed. This component is used when additional information is required but doesn't need to be displayed directly on the chart.
Style: e.g. light, compact, modern
Interactions: e.g. none, hover, clickable
Tags: chart, tooltip, label, invisible, utility

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
